name: Case360
description: Integrated case management platform used by Social Services for tracking citizen welfare cases. Handles ~12,000 active cases annually with full audit trail.

name: Eneo AI Platform
description: AI-powered decision-support tool for resource allocation and predictive service demand. Currently in pilot across 3 departments with 47 active models in production.

name: LearningPortal
description: Municipal e-learning platform used by 4,200 students across 18 schools. Hosts curriculum content, assignments and staff professional development courses.

name: ElderCare Pro
description: Scheduling and care-record system for home care services. Supports 320 care workers managing 1,800 elderly residents. Compliant with HSL/IVO regulations.

name: Proxima Finance
description: SaaS ERP for municipal accounting, budgeting and procurement. Processes approx. 850M SEK annually across all 14 municipal units. Integrated with Raindance.

name: HR Maestro
description: Legacy HR system managing employee records for 3,400 municipal staff. Marked for sunset Q2 2026. Being migrated to Visma HR Cloud. Data export in progress.

name: PermitFlow
description: Building permit and planning permission workflow tool. Handles digitised applications from citizens, routes to relevant inspectors, and tracks decisions. Linked to national SSBF register.

name: CitizenConnect
description: Public-facing self-service portal for citizen requests, e-services and notifications. Averages 28,000 monthly sessions. Integrated with BankID, Skatteverket and local APIs.

name: SchoolBus Router
description: Route optimisation and scheduling tool for school transport. Covers 42 routes, 900 pupils, and integrates with the school system for attendance confirmation.

name: EnergyGrid View
description: Real-time monitoring dashboard for district heating and electricity consumption across municipal buildings. Feeds into sustainability reporting and CDO KPI tracking.

name: Archival Vault
description: Certified long-term digital archive for official municipal documents. Compliant with Riksarkivet e-archive standard. Currently holds 4.2 million records going back to 1998.

name: Library System
description: Integrated library management platform for 3 physical branches. Manages catalogue, loans, reservations and digital media. Serves 18,000 active library members.

name: PreSchool Admin
description: Application and waitlist management system for municipally run preschools. Linked to population register for automatic eligibility checks. Processes 1,200 applications/year.

name: Addiction Tracker
description: Legacy register for substance addiction treatment programmes. Scheduled for replacement by national system SoL Connect in Q4 2026. Data classified as sensitive personal data under GDPR Art. 9.

name: CityMap GIS
description: Geographic information system used by Planning, Infrastructure and Environment departments. Hosts all cadastral data, utility maps and zoning plans. Integrated with Lantmateriet.

name: Heating Billing
description: Billing and invoice management for district heating. Generates ~14,000 invoices monthly to households and businesses connect to the municipal heating network.

name: Recruitment Hub
description: New talent acquisition platform currently in procurement phase. Will replace HR Maestro recruitment module. Integration with Jobtech.se and LinkedIn APIs planned for Q3 2026.

name: Youth Center Booking
description: Retired booking system for recreational facilities. Decommissioned June 2024 and replaced by CitizenConnect self-service. All historical booking data has been migrated and archived.

name: Sanitation Logistics
description: Route planning and GPS tracking system for waste management and street cleaning. Manages 8 waste streams, 28 vehicles across 4 districts. Reports feed into sustainability dashboard.

name: Water Mgmt
description: Critical OT/IT system for drinking water and sewage infrastructure. Controls 12 pumping stations and 4 treatment plants. Classified as critical national infrastructure. 24/7 NOC monitoring.

name: Road Maintenance Portal
description: Citizen-facing reporting tool for road damage, potholes and signal faults. Routes geo-tagged tickets to maintenance crews and tracks resolution time. Avg. 340 reports/month.

name: Council Meeting Manager
description: Manages municipal council meeting agendas, minutes, voting records and public publication under Offentlighetsprincipen. Used by 45 elected councillors and 12 committee secretaries.

name: Fleet Manager
description: Vehicle booking and maintenance tracking for the 124-vehicle municipal fleet. Tracks mileage, CO2 emissions and service intervals. Mandatory quarterly reporting to Environment Dept.

name: Disability Services Register
description: Secure registry for citizens receiving LSS-based disability support. Tracks assessments, legal decisions and care plans for 640 registered individuals. Audited annually by IVO.

name: Urban Planning Board
description: Manages planning applications, zoning hearings and public consultation processes under PBL. Integrates with CityMap GIS for automatic spatial conflict detection.

name: Cultural Grants Portal
description: Application and award management for municipal cultural and arts grants (totalling 4.2M SEK annually). Processes 200+ applications per year from local associations and individuals.

name: Crisis Communication Hub
description: Emergency alert and mass notification system. Integrated with Viktigt Meddelande (national) and local radio P4. Activated 3 times in 2025 including a major flooding event.

name: Social Worker Scheduler
description: Rostering and shift-management for 280 Social Services field workers. Linked to payroll for automatic hours capture. Integrates with ElderCare Pro for handover notes.

name: Environmental Permit Tracker
description: Tracks environmental permit applications, inspection schedules and compliance status for 1,200 registered businesses. Linked to Naturvardsverket API for national reporting.

name: Food Inspection Register
description: Register of food business inspections, licences and enforcement orders. Synced with Livsmedelsverket national database. 480 businesses registered, 240 inspections carried out in 2025.

name: Visma HR Cloud
description: Cloud HCM platform onboarded in Nov 2025 as direct replacement for HR Maestro. Payroll module is live. Personnel records migration expected complete by Q2 2026.

name: School Absence Tracker
description: Automated absence notification system across 18 schools. Parents receive real-time SMS/push alerts. Generates compulsory school attendance reports for Education Dept. monthly.

name: Property Register
description: Internal register of ~2,400 municipality-owned properties, land parcels, leases and maintenance history. Linked to CityMap GIS and Lantmateriet for automatic updates.

name: Data Integration Layer
description: Central middleware platform enabling data exchange between 28 internal integration flows across 14 systems. Upgrade to cloud-native ESB scheduled for Q3 2026.

name: Citizen Analytics Dashboard
description: BI reporting platform aggregating CitizenConnect, LearningPortal and Social Services data for CDO strategic oversight. 18 active report templates. Powered by Power BI Embedded.

name: Elderly Day Activity Booking
description: Booking platform for senior daycare and community activity centres. Handles reservations across 6 locations for 420 regular participants. Integrated with ElderCare Pro.

name: IoT Platform
description: Central management platform for 1,800 connected sensors across municipal facilities including schools, libraries and parking zones. Data streams into EnergyGrid View.

name: Safety Incident Reporter
description: Staff tool for reporting workplace safety incidents and near-misses. Triggers mandatory investigation workflows and generates AFA Forsakring annual reports automatically.

name: Tax Revenue Terminal
description: Secure integration to Skatteverket for receiving local tax revenue disbursements. Handles monthly reconciliation of 620M SEK in annual tax receipts via encrypted VPN gateway.

name: Citizen Feedback Platform
description: Survey and NPS tool embedded in CitizenConnect. Collected 4,200 structured feedback responses in 2025. Average service satisfaction score: 3.8/5.

name: Smart Parking System
description: Sensor-based real-time parking availability monitoring across 6 municipal car parks (1,240 spaces total). Occupancy data surfaced in CitizenConnect and public traffic displays.

name: Social Media Monitor
description: Real-time social media listening tool scanning for municipal service mentions. Integrates with communications team Slack for instant crisis flagging. Covers 8 platforms.

name: Outdoor Lighting Controller
description: Remote monitoring and fault-reporting for 8,400 streetlights. Fault sensors auto-create repair orders in Sanitation Logistics, cutting average repair time from 8 to 2.5 days.

name: Funeral Services Manager
description: Administration of 5 municipal cemeteries. Manages burial plot registry, ceremony scheduling, headstone permits and invoicing. Processed 380 events in 2025.

name: Purchasing Compliance Checker
description: AI tool that screens all procurement decisions against LOU (Swedish public procurement law). Flagged 23 potential compliance breaches in 2025, preventing an estimated 4.1M SEK in legal risk.

name: Parking Fine Portal
description: Online payment and dispute resolution platform for parking penalties. Processed 12,600 fines in 2025 totalling 6.3M SEK. 71% of payments made online vs 45% in 2023.

name: Flood Risk Monitor
description: Environmental risk prediction tool using IoT sensor and weather API data to model flooding risk in 6 low-lying residential zones. Feeds automated alerts to CRICON.

name: Digital Archive Viewer
description: Public-facing viewer for historical municipal records in Archival Vault. Commonly used by journalists and academic researchers. Averages 620 unique monthly visitors.

name: Enterprise Data Catalogue
description: Data governance platform documenting data assets, ownership, lineage and GDPR classification across municipal systems. Currently covers 62% of active systems with a target of 90% by 2026 Q4.

name: IT Asset Register
description: Central CMDB for all hardware endpoints and licensed software. 4,200 endpoints registered. Used as the authoritative source for cybersecurity risk scoring and license compliance.
